nasb.text: When they were filled, He *said to His disciples, “Gather up the leftover fragments so that nothing will be lost.”

esv.text: And when they had eaten their fill, he told his disciples, “Gather up the leftover fragments, that nothing may be lost.”

cnv.text: 他們吃飽了之後，耶穌對門徒說：“把剩下的零碎收拾起來，免得浪費。”

ccb.text: 他们吃饱后，耶稣对门徒说：“把剩下的零碎收拾起来，免得浪费。”

csbs.text: 大家吃饱了以后，耶稣就对他的门徒们说：“把剩下的碎块收拾起来，免得浪费。”
